Jordan Calloway
jordan.calloway@email.com  |  (555) 204-8371  |  github.com/jcalloway-dev

SUMMARY
Computer Information Technology graduate with 3 years of prior experience in healthcare support
and hospitality operations. Built a shift-scheduling web app to solve a real workflow problem from
my previous career. Strong communicator and quick learner with hands-on project experience in
Python, SQL, and React.

EDUCATION

B.S. Computer Information Technology
Westfield University of Applied Sciences
September 2022 – May 2025
GPA: 3.4

PROJECTS

ShiftBridge — Shift Scheduling and Coverage Tool
Personal project  |  August 2024 – Present
- Built a full-stack scheduling web app used by 3 former colleagues at Riverside Community Clinic
  to manage shift swaps, coverage requests, and weekly availability
- Backend: Python (Flask), SQLite database with 8 tables; wrote all SQL schema and migration scripts
- Frontend: React with vanilla CSS; built reusable shift calendar component
- Implemented user authentication using session-based login with Flask-Login
- Deployed on a personal VPS using Nginx and Gunicorn; ~40 active users
- Repo: github.com/jcalloway-dev/shiftbridge

Patient Intake Tracker (Capstone)
Westfield University of Applied Sciences  |  January 2025 – April 2025
- Team of 2; built a command-line Python tool for tracking outpatient intake forms
- Used Python's csv module and argparse for CLI interface; wrote unit tests with pytest
- Designed SQLite schema for patient visit records (anonymized synthetic data)
- Presented to 3 faculty reviewers; received highest mark in cohort

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Front Desk Coordinator
Riverside Community Clinic — Glenbrook, IL
March 2021 – July 2022 (1 year, 4 months)

- Managed scheduling for 6 providers across 3 specialties using manual spreadsheet system;
  identified inefficiencies that later motivated the ShiftBridge project
- Handled patient intake, insurance verification, and appointment reminders for ~80 patients/day
- Trained 4 new front desk staff on clinic check-in procedures and HIPAA protocols
- Coordinated with billing team to resolve 30–40 insurance discrepancy cases per month
- Maintained patient records in EHR system with high accuracy under time pressure

Guest Services Associate
Summit Hotel Group — Chicago, IL
June 2019 – February 2021 (1 year, 8 months)

- Assisted 100+ guests per shift with check-in, room requests, and issue resolution at a
  240-room property
- Resolved escalated guest complaints and coordinated with housekeeping and maintenance teams
- Recognized as "Associate of the Month" three times for guest satisfaction scores
- Processed reservations and billing adjustments using hotel property management software

TECHNICAL SKILLS

Languages: Python, SQL, JavaScript
Frontend: React, CSS, HTML
Backend: Flask, SQLite
Tools: Git, GitHub, Nginx, pytest
Currently learning: TypeScript, PostgreSQL
